$comment: Generated from the hub catalog by tools/gen-app-defs.mjs edit the catalog, not here.
name: Holo Git
summary: A self-hosted git forge issues, pull requests and merges, serverless.

description.p: Hosting code and collaborating shouldn't depend on a central server.
Git objects live on the content-addressed store, issues and pull requests are conflict-free replicated types, and clone/fetch/push run over a content-blind relay.

ul: Issues and PRs as conflict-free replicated data
Open a PR on one peer, merge on another

releases.description: Serverless multiuser forge: git transfer by κ, CvRDT issues/PRs, 3-way merge.
